ksa_text: Knowledge of data policy authoring and governance, including policy structure standards, approval workflows, enforcement mechanisms, exception handling, and policy lifecycle management.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of implementation) and updated as necessary.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of implementation) and updated as necessary.
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: knowledge from Data Governance (affinity 0.72); strategic/implementation framing outweighs governance signals. STRM composite is strong (0.4395). A Data Ethics Officer would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 2 match(es) in governance job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Ethics Officer whose mandate centers on policy, oversight, and governance.

decision_rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: knowledge from Data Governance (affinity 0.72); strategic/implementation framing outweighs governance signals. STRM composite is strong (0.4395). A Data Ethics Officer would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.
